name: run_nmap_scan
description: Runs an nmap scan against any specified target (IP, hostname, or CIDR). Only standard, non-destructive flags are allowed.

target.description: Target IP, hostname, or CIDR block (e.g. 'scanme.nmap.org', '192.168.1.0/24', '127.0.0.1').

arguments.description: Optional nmap flags (e.g. '-F', '-p 80,443', '-sV', '-O'). Restricted to safe, non-destructive options.

name: file_creator
description: Resolves directories recursively and writes the specified content into the target file path.

path.description: Target file path (can be relative or absolute). Parent directories will be created recursively if needed.

content.description: Content to write to the file.
